title: Mahindra Lifespace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Lifespace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Lifespace has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
